$comment: Dialogue test-catalog (ADR-0003, A22). dart run build_runner build projects this into dialogue_fixture.g.dart (typed factory registry binding the genesis_perception Node/Field species) and dialogue_fixture.g.json (LLM tool schema). Edit THIS file, then re-run the builder; the generator-in-sync test guards the committed artifacts. Envelopes deserialize into REAL perception Node/Field trees through this registry.

catalog.name: dialogue_fixture
catalog.description: Dialogue wire-layer test catalog binding the genesis_perception Node (container) and Field (leaf) species, so A2UI v0.9 envelopes deserialize into real measurement trees.

node.description: A named container component. Holds an ordered list of child components referenced by id.

name.description: Structural name of this node in the measurement.

field.description: A named value leaf holding a single string datum. Cannot have children.

name.description: Name of this datum within the measurement.

value.description: Measured string value at configuration time.
